title: 3D Mace & Wind Charge
description: The Best 3D Model Of Mace & Wind-Charge!
body:
# 3D Mace & Wind Charge - By Aries xD
Tired of your Mace & Wind-Charge looking flat and boring in Minecraft? Amazing 3D Mace & Wind-Charge changes that! This resource pack turns the simple 2D texture into a cool 3D model, so your Mace & Wind-Charge looks heavier, stronger, and more realistic.
